name: urbanclash-monorepo
description: Orquestrador principal para o projeto UrbanClash Team

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONT,BACKS" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:all --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
